positive.text: Thank you so much for your kind review! We're thrilled to hear you had a great experience. If you ever have any questions, feel free to reach out to us at trust@epica-beauty.com — we're always happy to help!

negative.text: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're sorry to hear your experience didn't meet your expectations. Please email us at trust@epica-beauty.com and our support team will do their best to resolve this for you.
